name: Missed Call SMS Templates
description: Array of SMS template variants for missed call recovery. Designed for A/B testing to optimize response rates.
compliance_notes: All variants must include clinic identification
All variants must avoid prohibited language
First message in a new SMS thread must include opt-out language
Do not send outside 8 AM - 9 PM local time

variants.text: Hi! This is {ClinicName}. Sorry we missed your call -- I can help you right here by text, or we can set up a time to call you back. Whatever's easiest! Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi, this is {ClinicName}! We missed your call and wanted to make sure we got back to you. Were you looking to schedule an appointment, or did you have a question? Happy to help right here! Reply STOP to opt out.
Hi! {ClinicName} here -- sorry we missed your call! Need any help? Just reply here anytime. Reply STOP to opt out.
Hi! This is {ClinicName}. We saw we missed your call -- sorry about that! Would you like us to call you back at a time that works for you, or I can help right here by text. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi there! This is {ClinicName}. I know it can be frustrating when you can't get through -- sorry about that. I'm here now and happy to help with anything you need. Just reply here! Reply STOP to opt out.
